entries.title: CAD After-Call Reports
added: MDT now includes a Reports tab for officers to file after-call incident reports.
Reports can link to a CAD/911 call, an involved civilian profile, call type, disposition, location, narrative, actions taken, and evidence or clip links.
Officers can mark calls as cleared, founded, unfounded, report taken, citation issued, arrest made, referred to CID, false alarm, or unable to locate.
Recent reports now appear in the MDT side watch panel for quick command review.
changed: Linked CAD calls are automatically cleared when an after-call report is filed as cleared, unfounded, false alarm, or unable to locate.
CAD report narratives preserve long-form text and line breaks for detailed officer documentation.
CID Command quick actions now include direct access to CAD Reports.
fixed: Officers now have a dedicated place to document incident outcomes instead of relying only on tickets, panic alerts, or court cases.
Updated PWA cache versioning so installed MDT views load the new Reports tab.

entries.title: CID Command MDT
added: CID users now open into a dedicated CID Command MDT instead of a patrol-style MDT with only investigation tabs.
New CID Command dashboard with priority case watch, active warrant operations, intelligence feed, internal affairs queue, and quick action launchers.
CID-wide side intelligence panels for command tracker, priority cases, and warrant watch.
Warrant detail popup can now be opened from the CID Command dashboard, side watch, or Warrant Ops board.
changed: CID MDT shell now uses CID-specific navigation labels, command statistics, title treatment, and investigative visual styling.
Warrant Ops and Internal Affairs intake screens now use the same CID command-board layout as investigations.
CID case notes now store full text instead of being capped at the previous note length.
fixed: CID MDT no longer feels limited to a single Investigations tab; the whole module is now an investigative command system.
Non-CID users are safely returned to NCIC if an old session points at a CID-only tab.
Updated PWA cache versioning so installed MDT views load the new CID Command MDT.

entries.title: CID Investigation Desk Redesign
added: Investigative MDT CID Investigations tab now has a redesigned command-desk case intake board.
CID investigation creation now includes a target civilian dropdown populated from all user profiles.
Target civilian selection auto-fills the target name while still allowing unlisted target aliases.
changed: CID investigation summaries now store full text instead of being capped at the previous short limit.
CID investigation intake layout now uses a larger long-form summary area and cleaner responsive mobile layout.
fixed: Removed the need for officers to type raw target CIV database IDs when opening CID investigations.
Updated PWA cache versioning so installed MDT views load the redesigned CID tab.

entries.title: Character Profiles and Name Locking
added: Profile app now includes a character roster where players can create multiple RP characters.
Players can activate a saved character and the active character name becomes the profile name used across the PWA.
Profile app now includes a controlled active-name change form with a 3 changes per 3 days limit.
Admin Account pop-up now shows character count and name-change status.
changed: Existing accounts automatically receive a default character based on their current profile name.
Name-change limits are enforced by the backend instead of only being hidden in the UI.
fixed: Admins and owners can unlock a user's name changes from the Account pop-up after the limit locks them.
Updated PWA cache versioning so installed phone views load the new Profile character tools.

entries.title: DMV License Approval Countdown
added: DMV License page now shows a visible approval queue card after a driver license application is submitted.
Pending license applications now display a countdown until automatic approval.
Countdown uses the owner-configured DMV autopilot approval time from System Settings.
changed: DMV license applications refresh automatically when their approval countdown reaches zero.
DMV API now returns license autopilot settings and estimated approval times for pending applications.
fixed: Made driver license approval visible to civilians even without a separate DMV department dashboard.
Updated PWA cache versioning so the DMV countdown page replaces older cached DMV screens.

entries.title: Profile Warrants and Fire Chief Rigs
added: NCIC/DMV searches now open a civilian profile popup with attached warrant records.
Civilian profile popup now has a Warrants tab with active and previous warrant history.
Fire Chief role for command-level Fire MDT access.
Fire Chief rig builder for assigning personnel to Engine 1, Ladder 1, Truck 1, Rescue 1, and Battalion 1.
changed: CID warrant board now uses button containers and detail popups instead of showing full warrant files on the main wall.
Served, recalled, and expired warrants move out of the active warrant board and into previous warrant history.
fixed: Fixed warrants not appearing on the searched civilian profile record.
Fixed fire alerts not recognizing a dedicated Fire Chief command role.
Updated PWA cache versioning so profile warrant and Fire Chief rig changes replace older cached MDT screens.

entries.title: Issue Criminal Charge Warrants
added: Issue Criminal Charge screen now has the civilian name/CIV dropdown directly inside the Issue form.
Issue Criminal Charge screen now includes a Bypass Court section.
Bypass Court creates an active warrant linked directly to the selected account without creating a court docket case.
changed: Criminal charge submissions from the Issue screen now sign and issue an active warrant immediately.
Criminal catalog Use Charge now opens the Issue screen with that criminal charge already selected.
fixed: Fixed the criminal charge issue flow still relying on a raw CIV ID instead of the profile dropdown.
Fixed charge warrants being available in the wrong MDT area instead of the Issue Criminal Charge section.
Updated PWA cache versioning so the corrected Issue Criminal Charge screen replaces older cached MDT screens.

entries.title: Criminal Charge Warrants
added: Criminal Charges tab now includes a charge-warrant writer with civilian profile dropdown, criminal charge selector, probable cause, priority, and optional linked CID case.
Officers can sign and issue an active warrant directly from a criminal charge.
changed: Signed charge warrants now create both a court criminal charge and a linked active warrant for the selected civilian.
fixed: Criminal charges can now be tied to warrant creation instead of only appearing as catalog entries.
Updated PWA cache versioning so the Criminal Charges warrant writer replaces older cached MDT screens.

entries.title: CID Warrant Linking
added: CID warrant creation now includes a civilian profile dropdown for selecting the warrant subject by name and CIV number.
changed: Warrants now store the selected civilian profile ID with the subject name so warrant records remain linked to the correct player profile.
fixed: Fixed warrants not attaching cleanly to civilian profiles when officers only typed a subject name.
Updated PWA cache versioning so the warrant-linking form replaces older cached MDT screens.

entries.title: DMV License Autopilot
added: Driver license auto-approval system for submitted DMV license applications.
Owner-controlled DMV autopilot settings under the System app with pending and eligible license queue counts.
MDT civilian profile popup with profile and driver license tabs.
Law enforcement driver license suspension action from the MDT license tab.
changed: Driver license applications default to auto-approval after 6 minutes when DMV autopilot is enabled.
Suspended or revoked driver licenses are protected from automatic re-approval.
fixed: Added a license approval path so DMV applications no longer remain submitted forever when no admin review screen exists.
Updated PWA cache versioning so the CID investigation folder interface replaces older MDT layouts on mobile.

entries.title: System Autopilot Controls
added: Owner-only System Settings app icon.
Auto pilot verification mode for automatically verifying civilian accounts after a configurable waiting period.
System queue stats showing pending accounts and accounts eligible for auto-verification.
Fire Department MDT for fireman and EMS roles with active 911 incident tracking.
Fireman role option in account role assignment.
changed: Default auto-verification wait time starts at 120 minutes and can be adjusted by the owner.
911 emergency alerting now supports Police, Fire, and EMS department selection.
fixed: Updated PWA cache versioning so new app modules like Fire MDT load after deployment instead of using stale mobile bundles.

entries.title: Initial Roleplay PWA System
added: Mobile PWA phone dashboard with app-style icons, locked/unlocked app states, dock shortcuts, and smoother mobile OS visual styling.
Civilian registration with required Arma ID, generated six-digit CIV number, verification flow, and owner/admin account management.
Read-only Changelog app loaded from the GitHub-managed repository file.
DMV app with driver license applications, vehicle registration, plate/VIN records, insurance status, and DMV profile display.
Automatic DMV VIN generation when civilians register vehicles.
Messages app unlocked for verified users.
Admin dashboard with compact account list, account popup, role assignment, verification controls, Arma ID visibility, job settings, market caps, and owner/admin password reset.
MDT/CAD app for owner and assigned LEO/CID roles with NCIC/DMV search, invalid-return notice popup, citation writer, criminal charge writer, panic button, and active alert watch list.
Owner-only panic alert clearing from the MDT panic screen.
Separate MDT citation and criminal charge catalogs, including New York Penal Law criminal charge entries.
Court system with active/previous case tabs, defendant case view, officer case tracking, judge docket, final result display, and auto-generated court dates.
CID investigative MDT tools with investigation tracking, case notes, warrant operations, and internal affairs records.
Civilian Contracts app with anonymous open contract board, accept flow, owner read-only monitoring, and required in-game proof clip URL submission.

Business Registry app with civilian business applications, registrar review workflow, license issuance, staff inspections, violations, suspensions, revocations, weekly tax settings, reputation scores, and dedicated City Hall/economy roles.
changed: Contracts app now uses a dark web-style phone interface with first-open instructions.
Contract posting now targets RP character names only and no longer accepts email lookup.
Contracts now include target type, last-known area, briefing, and completion requirement details.
Only pure civilian accounts can post or accept contracts; owner remains monitor-only.
Home screen no longer shows pending income or tracked server minutes.
Jobs, Bank, Cash App, and Properties remain locked/coming soon while Messages is available.
Admin access no longer automatically grants MDT, CID, LEO, or judge access.
Admin account role assignment now includes business_owner, business_registrar, city_hall, and economy_manager roles for business registry access.
Business applications now show a dynamic approval progress tracker from submitted to review, interview, and final decision.
Profile now shows account details only while external linking is paused for verification.
Court tabs only appear when the user has the matching role or owner override.
MDT opens as a full law enforcement dashboard instead of staying confined to the phone panel.
Mobile MDT now uses animated Menu and Watch slide-out drawers so officers can navigate without the tabs crushing the screen.
Phone icons, dock, and home layout were restyled to feel more like an iPhone/Android app launcher.
fixed: Fixed PostgreSQL LIKE migration crash by parameterizing the traffic citation pattern.
Fixed low-contrast MDT charge dropdown styling.
Fixed NCIC/DMV search empty results by showing an official invalid-return notice with a reference number.
Fixed admin user page overload by moving account details and actions into a popup.
Fixed role leakage where admin accounts were being treated like owner accounts for MDT/CID/LEO/judge access.
Fixed panic alert workflow so owners can clear active panic hits.
Fixed mobile MDT layout collisions where navigation, watch panels, and form controls stacked into an unreadable phone view.
removed: Removed the unlocked-home income summary card from the main screen.
Removed owner/admin edit or delete controls from the Changelog app; changelog content is developer-managed through the repository.
